'''''Velumina''''' was a [[Hornet-class carrier|''Hornet''-class carrier]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sorran]]. 

In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], equipped with [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95s]] and [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Vulture droids]], it launched an [[Battle at TFP-9|attack]] on [[Station TFP-9]]. Using [[Baffled drive|baffled]] [[Sublight engine/Legends|Sublight drives]] and [[Sound-dampening field|dampened]] power systems, the [[Naboo (people)|Naboo]] [[pilot/Legends|pilots]] did not detect it, until it launched its Headhunters and raised its [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]], entering the battle later.<ref name="The Starfighter Trap" />
